_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the distance-3 surface-code XX-merge, with the ZONE TAXONOMY of Qian Xu's factoring architecture (the ~10,000-atom layout: memory + processor + factory + operation-zone ancilla N_A + reservoir; see FormalRV Corpus/QianxuBounds + Xu et al. 2024 Nat.Phys. Fig.1). Neutral-atom hardware has ONE physical storage array (all idle atoms) partitioned by ROLE into separated regions, plus an ENTANGLING zone where Rydberg gates fire. Here: storage SLM 0 partitioned (with gaps) into MEMORY/DATA (the surface-code patches, cols 0-5), OPERATION-ZONE ANCILLA (mediating syndrome ancillae, cols 8-13), FACTORY (|CCZ> magic, cols 16-19, reserved/empty -- Clifford merge), RESERVOIR (spare, cols 21-23); the ENTANGLING/processor zone (SLMs 3-4) is where the merge's Rydberg CZ happens. Distances um, durations us.
name: surface3_qianxu_zoned_arch
